name: Earth Odyssey with Dylan Dreyer
overview: Viewers go on an incredible journey to the wildest points of the globe, uncovering the connection between the environment, wildlife and human beings of exotic locales. Each week, a new destination is revealed, ranging from Africa to Indochina and the Middle East, as well as many untamed islands around the world.

trailers.title: First Look at Earth Odyssey with Dylan Dreyer on NBC!
